title: AX Combat Bond Earnings
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS totalReward FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT AwardingFaction AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS value FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY AwardingFaction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {totalReward} Cr earned in combat bonds during the report period. AX combat zone bonds are paid by the factions defending their settlements from Thargoid incursion — they carry a different weight than ordinary bounties and represent organised armed resistance against an existential threat.
details.help: FactionKillBond in AX contexts is awarded by the defending human faction. totalReward drives the title as the total bond earnings.

tagLines: AX combat bond earnings compiled. Anti-xeno engagement bond awards noted by faction.
The factions pay for Thargoid kills because they can't always do it themselves. You helped.
AX bonds are smaller than the effort deserves. Nobody agrees on what a Thargoid kill is really worth.
